debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G✝ H C : Graph α β
S X Y : Set α
M M' : Set β
u v x y z : α
e f : β
P P' : WList α β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G✝ M
G : Graph α β
⊢ ∀ X ⊆ G.vertexSet, Matroid.ExistsMaximalSubsetProperty (fun S => ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) X

failed_attempts: sorry, fun S hS ↦ (hC hS).2⟩) hI hIX
sorry, fun S hS ↦ subset_sUnion_of_mem hS⟩) I hI hIX

intro X hX
    apply zorn_subset
    intro c hc hchain hne
    refine ⟨⋃₀ c, ?_, fun _ ↦ sUnion_subset⟩
    sorry
fun S ⟨M, hM, hS⟩ ↦ (encard_le_encard hS).trans (hM.encard_V_le_two_mul_encard.trans (by simpa using hM.encard_le))⟩

apply Matroid.exists_maximal_subset_property_of_bdd_encard
    use 2 * ν(G)
    rintro S ⟨M, hM, hSM⟩
    refine (encard_le_encard hSM).trans ?_
    refine (G.vDegree_sum_matching hM).symm.trans_le ?_
    rw [← mul_2, mul_comm]
    exact mul_le_mul_left' hM.encard_le 2

intro X _ I hI hIX
    let P := {J | (∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ J ⊆ V(G, M)) ∧ I ⊆ J ∧ J ⊆ X}
    obtain ⟨B, ⟨⟨M, hM, hBM⟩, hIB, hBX⟩, hBmax⟩ := zorn_subset I hI (fun c hc hchain hnc ↦ by
      obtain rfl | hne := c.eq_empty_or_nonempty
      · exact ⟨I, ⟨hI, subset_refl _, hIX⟩, fun _ a ↦ a.elim⟩
      refine ⟨⋃₀ c, ⟨?_, ?_, fun S hS ↦ subset_sUnion_of_mem hS⟩, fun S hS ↦ subset_sUnion_of_mem hS⟩
      · obtain ⟨M, hM, hIM⟩ := hI
        refine ⟨M, hM, ?_⟩
        sorry -- Union of matchable sets in a chain is matchable
      · exact hIB.trans (subset_sUnion_of_mem hne.some_mem)
      · exact sUnion_subset fun S hS ↦ (hc hS).2.2) hIX
    exact ⟨B, ⟨M, hM, hBM⟩, hIB, hBX, hBmax⟩

intro X hX I hI hIX
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hIM⟩ := hI
    obtain ⟨J, ⟨hJ, hJX⟩, hIJ, hJmax⟩ := zorn_subset_isMaximal {S | (∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) ∧ S ⊆ X} (fun c hc h_chain h_ne ↦ ⟨⋃₀ c, ⟨by sorry, ⋃₀_subset hc⟩, fun _ ↦ subset_⋃₀⟩) I ⟨hI, hIX⟩
    exact ⟨J, hJmax, hIJ, hJX⟩

let 𝒥 := {S | (∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) ∧ S ⊆ X}
    have h_chain : ∀ c ⊆ 𝒥, IsChain (· ⊆ ·) c → c.Nonempty → ⋃₀ c ∈ 𝒥 := by sorry
    obtain ⟨J, ⟨hJ_match, hJX⟩, hIJ, hJmax⟩ := zorn_subset_isChain h_chain hI hIX
    exact ⟨J, hJ_match, hIJ, hJX, fun K hK hJK hKX ↦ hJmax ⟨hK, hKX⟩ hJK⟩

intro X hX I hI hIX
    let P := fun S ↦ ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)
    let S_X := {S | S ⊆ X ∧ P S}
    have h_chain : ∀ c, c ⊆ S_X → IsChain (⊆) c → c.Nonempty → ⋃₀ c ∈ S_X := by
      sorry
    obtain ⟨B, hB_mem, hIB, hB_max⟩ := zorn_subset S_X h_chain I ⟨hIX, hI⟩
    exact ⟨B, ⟨hB_mem.1, hB_mem.2⟩, hIB, fun B' hB' hBB' ↦ hB_max B' ⟨hB'.1, hB'.2⟩ hBB'⟩

intro X _ I hI hIX
    refine zorn_subset_nonempty {S | (∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) ∧ S ⊆ X} ?_ I ⟨hI, hIX⟩
    intro c hc hcc hne
    exact ⟨⋃₀ c, ⟨sorry, ⋃₀_subset (fun s hs ↦ (hc hs).2)⟩, fun s hs ↦ subset_sUnion_of_mem hs⟩
